description_long: This is a compact, modern convenience store building with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The storefront features a prominent sign with Japanese text, a glass entrance door, and a small awning above the entrance. The building is attached to a neighboring structure, with a driveway and a parked car situated between the two. The sidewalk in front is paved with concrete tiles, and there is a utility pole with overhead wires and a fire hydrant nearby. The exterior walls are finished in neutral tones, with some brickwork and painted details, and there is minimal decorative ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and accessibility.
description: A modern, compact convenience store with a glass entrance, Japanese signage, and a clean, geometric facade. The building is attached to a neighbor, with a driveway and car between them.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass door, Japanese signage, awning, sidewalk, driveway, parked car, utility pole, and fire hydrant.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blank wall of the adjacent building, the open rooftop area, and the continuation of the sidewalk and street.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the buildings, the car parked in the driveway, and minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_3: Side view with visible wall art, utility pole, sidewalk, and partial view of the rooftop and driveway.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular, wall-mounted sign with Japanese text in black and red on a white background, positioned above the entrance and partially under a small awning. The sign is not illuminated and is flush-mounted to the facade.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Single glass swinging door with a metal frame, high transparency, and a visible handle.
attribute_display_windows: One medium-sized display window adjacent to the entrance, framed in metal, with high transparency and no visible advertisements.
